stemHtml: Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - VFR Chart ED-4. A crew is planning a VFR flight from Schönberg aerodrome EDPK (N48°03’, E012°30’) to Grabenstätt aerodrome (N47°51’, E012°33’). What is a possible hazard the pilot can expect?

options.a: The Radio/TV tower Northwest of Schonberg aerodrome.
options.c: The pilot may become lost because there are no distinct ground features for orientation.
